name: Obby: Chop Trees in the Forest
description: Chop Trees. Level Up. Become the Strongest! Welcome to the lobby, where you can prepare for your run: buy speed, strength, and XP potions, stock up on bombs and dynamite, and open chests of different rarities to get random powerful weapons! Jump into the portal and you’ll find yourself in an endless forest The farther you go, the tougher the trees become, and the more strength you’ll need to chop them down. For every tree you cut, you earn XP, level up, and increase your weapon’s power!
instructions: Controls Movement On PC W mdash forward A mdash left S mdash backward D mdash right On mobile Use the joystick in the bottom-left corner of the screen Camera Rotation On PC Hold the right mouse button and move the mouse On Mobile Swipe
